briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby Parks, Recreation and Culture Plan Based on 2025 Public Feedback
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to consider a new Parks, Recreation and Culture Plan shaped by community input gathered in summer 2025. The draft plan will set priorities for parks, recreation centres, and cultural facilities across the city based on what over 3,000 residents said they want improved.
briefs.action_required: Review the draft plan when released in early 2026 and submit feedback before Council votes.

key_dates.label: Burnaby PRC Plan key directions and recommendations — public release expected
